title: Thermally Insulated Dewar Vessel
selected_approach: 1 L silvered borosilicate Dewar flask (e.g., Wilmad or Ace Glass). Foam-covered lid with ports for heater probe and RTD. Parasitic heat loss characterised at < 2 mW/K. Sample volume 500 mL. Used as the adiabatic reaction chamber for Cp and heat-of-mixing experiments.
